emails.subject: Thursday morning
emails.body: Phillip, Last week we discussed me spending time with you one morning to see exactly what it is that I will be doing. I imagine it will be more of an observing lesson than anything else, but I would like to stop by Thursday morning. If you are available, what time should I come down there? Zac

emails.subject: RE: Thursday morning
emails.body: RE: Thursday morning come down whenever, we can find something to show you. PL To: Love, Phillip M.

emails.subject: RE: Thursday morning
emails.body: Sounds good. See you tomorrow. To: McCarroll, Zachary
